calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances by Court Call: William Keeler for Barbara Cavanaugh (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the purpose for filing for probate in California is to prosecute an action against the CPA. Mr. Keeler addressed the issue with regard to bond and stated that there is no asset and no protential California creditor to require a bond. Furthermore, he reported on the status of the litigation. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required at this time.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
